summary: Post-refactor regression test of 2good2breal API (server.py 4334 -> 81 lines, split into config.py, models/, utils/, services/, routes/). All requested backend endpoints and core frontend flows pass cleanly. 14/14 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend landing, user login (Johanna), and admin dashboard all functional.

issues: Untranslated i18n key 'results.trustLevel.pending' rendered as raw string on analysis cards. Pre-existing (not caused by refactor) but worth fixing.

action_items: Fix i18n missing key 'results.trustLevel.pending' shown as raw string in dashboard Recent Analyses (cosmetic, pre-existing).
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is now a clean 81-line entrypoint - good separation of concerns.
CORS uses allow_origins=['*'] with allow_credentials=False which is acceptable for token-based auth but should be tightened for production with explicit origins.
JWT_SECRET, ADMIN_PASSWORD, STRIPE_API_KEY are committed in /app/backend/.env - flag for production rotation (test env only).
seed_data_creation: None - used existing user Johanna and admin
context_for_next_testing_agent: Refactor verified: all endpoints from monolithic server.py preserved after modular split. Backend test suite at /app/backend/tests/test_refactor.py covers health, auth (admin+user), packages, /api/admin/analyses, /api/seeker/profiles, /api/seeker/comparisons, /api/stats, /api/credits, /api/filters, /api/auth/forgot-password, /api/auth/register dup-email 400, and unauthorized access. Both /api/admin/login and /api/auth/login return JWT tokens. Frontend untouched and works against refactored backend.
